title: How to duplicate items in the same board

posts.author: Erickss18 (Erick )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all! I am trying to make an automation that I thought was very simple but I can not do it, what I am trying to do is to put several groups in a single board and have a “main” group at the beginning of the board where everything I add in the other groups is duplicated in that main group, in date order and without being deleted from the other groups and all updates that are made in the different groups are also made in that main group. I thought I could put the rule - “when an item is created, duplicate in group", but it does not exist. Does anyone have any idea how to do it? thanks!
